settings.title: White Seam Tape
settings.text: Bright white tape for joining seams, sealing edges, and matching the white BlueTex finish.

settings.title: 6" White Repair Tape
settings.text: Wider white tape for larger tears, repairs, and patching work.

settings.title: Foil Seam Tape
settings.text: Foil tape for foil-facing seams and related insulation work.

settings.title: Double-Sided Tape
settings.text: Used with door kits and selected attachment details.
